response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the core stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, and Docker/Kubernetes — and his current role at re:cinq includes direct AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, which is a meaningful differentiator for this position. The primary gaps are the absence of explicit NestJS experience (the stated backend framework), no mention of Jest/Vitest/Playwright (the required testing frameworks), and Kotlin is absent from his skill set. Despite these gaps, his demonstrated engineering depth, testing culture, and adaptability across many languages and environments make him worth a conversation.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq directly satisfies the AI agent development requirement
Proven TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS/Docker stack covers the majority of the primary and secondary technology requirements
Strong testing philosophy evidenced by building open-source test frameworks and running TDD/refactoring workshops
concerns: No explicit NestJS experience mentioned despite it being the primary backend framework for the role
Jest, Vitest, and Playwright are absent from the resume; testing background is largely in DLang-specific tooling
Kotlin is not listed anywhere in skills or employment history, leaving a gap in the required JVM secondary stack
